evidence_direction_note: Superseded by V3-EXQ-512a. EXQ-512 ran at interoceptive_noise_scale=1.0 (default calibration) and failed C3 (body-noise residual indistinguishable from quiet baseline, mean quiet_gap=-0.00151). Root cause: autonomic sigma=0.02 produces perturbations at the same scale as the forward model's natural prediction error (~0.025-0.035 residual in both arms). The failure reflects insufficient noise magnitude to create a clear discriminative signal, not a falsification of the SD-048 architectural principle. EXQ-512a recalibrates at scale=3.0 to confirm the mechanism works; governance holds v3_pending pending EXQ-512a.
